metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.created.total
metrics.description: entity_kind: sport / discipline / position. source: platform_seed / admin_created / tenant_custom.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.active.count
metrics.description: Point-in-time count. Populated hourly by the metrics-snapshot task. Baseline for platform-seeded Sport: >= 30.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.per_tenant_custom.count
metrics.description: Global histogram of customs-per-tenant. Feeds the sports-registry-adoption dashboard. Most tenants have 0 customs; Enterprise power users may have 20+.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.custom_disabled_refusals.total
metrics.description: How often SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_DISABLED fires. Feeds the Medium → Enterprise upsell funnel.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.quota_exceeded.total
metrics.description: How often the sports_registry_custom_slot cap is hit.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.slug_collision.total
metrics.description: collision_kind: platform_shadow (tenant tried to shadow platform slug) / duplicate_same_tenant. Signals tenant naming friction.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.resolver.total
metrics.description: outcome: matched / unresolved. level: sport / sport_discipline / triple. cache_status: hit / miss. Sampled per config('sports_registry.telemetry.resolver_sample_ratio').

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.resolver.duration_ms
metrics.description: SportKeyResolver latency. P99 target < 10ms cold, < 2ms warm.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.seed.duration_ms
metrics.description: SeedPlatformSportsCatalogJob end-to-end latency. source: platform_boot / admin_reseed / legacy_backfill_command. First-boot: <30s target for the 400+ row catalog.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.reconciler.duration_ms
metrics.description: ReconcileSportReferencesJob end-to-end latency. Grows with the number of Wave 3 rows scanned; benchmark to keep the run under 30 min even at 1M+ enrollments.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.reference_drift.count
metrics.description: Count of unresolved (sport_key / discipline_key / position_key) references detected by the reconciler. Ideally always 0; a non-zero value pages ops.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.reference_drift.total
metrics.description: Cumulative count of SportPrefixResolutionFailed events. Includes runtime failures (resolver_context=read / write) + reconciler-detected failures.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.downgrade_drift.count
metrics.description: Count of tenants that have downgraded off Enterprise + still have active tenant custom Registry rows. Feeds the FlagCustomsRetainedOnDowngrade listener signal.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.purge_pending.count
metrics.description: Deactivated tenant customs past their 730-day retention window that haven't been hard-deleted yet (either because they have references or because the purge queue is stuck). Feeds the `sports-registry-purge-queue-drained` health probe.

metrics.name: academorix.sports_registry.orphan_check.total
metrics.description: outcome: clean / orphans_found. Fires from PreventCustomRegistryOrphansOnTenantErased at tenant erasure time. `orphans_found > 0` signals cross-tenant FK drift — audit-critical.
